news.summary: Yesterday, on the second day of his official visit to France, Fahad Abdulrahman AlJalajel, the Minister of Health of Saudi Arabia, met with key French officials, including the Minister for Labour, Health, and Solidarity. The meetings aimed to strengthen relations between the two countries and discuss collaboration in the healthcare sector. This visit comes as part of broader efforts to enhance cooperation, with both parties looking to exchange expertise and best practices. The discussions highlighted areas for potential partnerships and touched on current health challenges faced by both nations. It is a part of ongoing diplomatic efforts, with both sides emphasizing the importance of international cooperation in addressing global health issues.
news.headline: Saudi Arabia and France deepen health cooperation through strategic agreements in biotech and digital health during official visit in Paris.

news.summary: In Lakeville, Minnesota, on April 16, 2025, Nystrom & Associates, a top provider of behavioral health services, has announced plans to enlarge its clinic in response to increased need for mental health services in the rapidly expanding suburbs of the Twin Cities. The clinic, located in Lakeville, will be adding more space and staff to accommodate the rising demand for services. This expansion comes as the suburb experiences significant growth, highlighting the importance of access to mental health care in the community.
news.headline: Nystrom & Associates expands Lakeville clinic in response to high demand for mental health care in Twin Cities suburb.

news.summary: On April 16, 2025, CBIZ, Inc. (NYSE: CBZ), a prominent national professional services advisor, is set to reveal its financial performance for the quarter that concluded on March 31, 2025. The announcement will be made before the market opens on Thursday, April 24, 2025. Following this, a conference call will be held to delve into the results and address any inquiries.
news.headline: CBIZ, Inc. (NYSE: CBZ) to release Q1 2025 results on April 24, 2025, before markets open. Conference call scheduled.

news.summary: The recent appointment of new directors marks a significant milestone for CenterPoint as it continues to strengthen its utility and customer-centric approach. The new directors, selected for their extensive expertise in the utility sector, operational efficiency, infrastructure resilience, hurricane and emergency preparedness, and financial acumen, are poised to drive the company forward. The appointments signify CenterPoint's commitment to enhancing its strategic direction and delivering value to its stakeholders. The onboarding of these directors is expected to propel CenterPoint's initiatives, leveraging their combined experience to navigate challenges and seize opportunities in the ever-evolving energy landscape.
news.headline: CenterPoint Energy appoints 2 new board members - Manuel Miranda and Laurie Fitch. Board to focus on utility improvement.

news.summary: The largest city in Panama has announced that its citizens will be able to make payments for taxes, tickets, fees, and permits using Bitcoin, Ethereum, and stablecoins. This move signifies a significant step towards embracing digital currencies within the city, providing residents with more flexible payment options.
news.headline: Panama City to accept Bitcoin, Ethereum, and stablecoins for taxes, tickets, fees, and permits, benefiting residents.

news.summary: On Wednesday, sellers dominated the market as rumors of a potential trade hurdle imposed by China on Nvidia caused unease among tech companies focused on artificial intelligence. The news resulted in a downturn across the market. The Dow Jones experienced a significant drop following comments made by Powell, while the imposition of Trump's restrictions impacted Mag 7 stocks negatively. In contrast, Warren Buffett's stocks saw an increase in value. This summary highlights the market's reaction to various developments, showcasing the volatility in the current investing landscape.
news.headline: Dow Jones dips due to Powell comments; AI tech firms affected by China trade news; Warren Buffett stock rises.

news.summary: The stock market experienced a significant drop in response to news of restrictions on Nvidia's AI chips and Federal Reserve Chairman Powell hinting at "tension" over Trump's tariffs. Taiwan Semiconductor also presents a looming concern. This led to a dive in Dow Jones Futures. Investors are urged to assess the situation and consider their next steps.
news.headline: Stock market plunges on Nvidia AI chip restrictions and Powell's comments on Trump tariffs tension. Taiwan Semi a concern.

news.summary: On April 16, 2025, in Houston, CenterPoint Energy, Inc. (NYSE: CNP) announced that its Board of Directors approved a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.2200 per share for its Common Stock. This dividend will be payable on June 12, 2025, to shareholders of record as of that date.
news.headline: CenterPoint Energy declares $0.22 regular dividend per share, payable on June 12, 2025.

news.summary: In Chihuahua, Mexico, on April 16, 2025, GCC, S.A.B. de C.V., a prominent cement, aggregates, and concrete producer in the US and Mexico, disclosed the execution of credit deals to fund the expansion of their cement plant in Odessa, Texas. The corporation is listed as GCC on the Mexican Stock Exchange, and this move marks a significant step in their growth strategy.
news.headline: GCC signs bank debt agreements to finance Odessa, Texas plant expansion. Successful conclusion to fund growth.

news.summary: In Philadelphia, recent news indicates that AREXVY has been recommended for adults aged 50-59 who are at higher risk for severe RSV disease by the US Advisory Committee on Immunization Practices. This recommendation emphasizes the importance of this vaccine for individuals in this age group to protect against the virus.AREXVY is aimed at providing protection specifically for this age group. This decision highlights the focus on preventing severe RSV disease in this population and reflects the current health concerns. This recommendation comes in light of the increasing risks posed by RSV and aims to enhance the protection of individuals aged 50-59.
news.headline: AREXVY recommended for adults aged 50-59 at increased risk for severe RSV disease by US Advisory Committee on Immunization Practices.

news.summary: Elemental Altus Royalties Corp. reported its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ending on December 31, 2024. The company saw a record revenue of US$16.3 million and adjusted revenue of US$21.6 million in 2024, a 39% increase from 2023. They produced 8,987 Gold Equivalent Ounces (GEOs) in 2024, with record Operating Cash Flow of US$8.7 million and adjusted EBITDA of US$15.1 million. The company also made significant accretive royalty acquisitions and repaid US$27 million of debt. In Q4 2024, they had record revenue of US$5.5 million and adjusted revenue of US$6.8 million, with attributable GEOs of 2,552 ounces. They expect to generate over US$45 million in total revenue and one-off payments in 2025, with a guidance of 11,600 to 13,200 GEOs. The CEO expressed confidence in the company's outlook, emphasizing the strong financial position and growth prospects moving forward. For detailed financial information, refer to the full article on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Elemental Altus Royalties Corp. had record financial results in 2024 with US$16.3M revenue, US$8.7M operating cash flow, and US$15.1M EBITDA. CEO predicts over US$45M revenue in 2025. Full story on Benzinga.com.

news.summary: In the latest updates, it has been reported that there has been an increase in the unemployment rate by 2% this quarter, with a total of 500,000 jobs lost. This rise has been attributed to the ongoing economic slowdown, affecting various industries. Additionally, the stock market also witnessed a decrease of 5% in the last week, signaling a trend of reduced investor confidence. Experts suggest that these changes may have significant impacts on the overall economy in the coming months. The government is looking into implementing strategies to address this situation and stabilize the job market and financial sector.
news.headline: Accusations of sex-for-work scandal at rubber plantations involving wealthy individuals.
Brazil to auction up to 20,000 foreign exchange swaps on April 17

news.summary: Two journalists dedicated more than 30 days to gather and examine data on the vast amounts of information gathered by the U.S. government about its citizens.
news.headline: Two reporters uncover data on 314 personal aspects collected by the US government, after a month-long analysis.

news.summary: The defendants are seeking to have their case dismissed, citing a recent memo from the Department of Justice regarding updated cryptocurrency regulations during the Trump administration.
news.headline: Crypto defendants claim $25M fraud case should be dismissed, citing recent DOJ memo on Trump's crypto policies.

news.summary: Solana's native token SOL reached $134 on April 14 but has since seen a 57% decrease from its all-time high. Despite this, the altcoin's rally may continue, with the Solana network ranking as the second-largest blockchain by total value locked (TVL) at $6.9 billion. Solana has outperformed competitors like Tron, Base, and Berachain and surpassed Ethereum in decentralized exchange (DEX) volumes, with $15.8 billion traded over seven days, a 50% increase over Ethereum. Solana's DEX activity increased by 16% in seven days, with significant growth seen in various applications on the network. Analysts predict a Solana spot exchange-traded fund (ETF) approval in the US by 2025, potentially strengthening Solana's position. However, without new catalysts, a price increase to $180 is unlikely. Additionally, the US government's cryptocurrency holdings are not expected to include SOL, and there are no plans to acquire assets other than Bitcoin.
news.headline: Solana's SOL price is up 36% from lows, reaching $134 but down 57% from high. It holds $6.9B TVL and leads in DEX volume. ETF approval expected in 2025. US gov audit shows no plans to acquire SOL. $180 rally unlikely without new participants.

news.summary: The market for ANGPTL3 inhibitors is experiencing considerable expansion due to a growing number of cases related to cardiovascular and lipid issues, notably familial hypercholesterolemia. Furthermore, key companies like Arrowhead Pharmaceuticals are expected to introduce new treatments, fueling this growth.
news.headline: Significant growth projected in ANGPTL3 inhibitor market from 2025-2034 across 7MM due to rising demand for lipid-lowering therapies.

news.summary: Colombian-based energy company GeoPark Limited (NYSE: GPRK) has released its 2024 SPEED/Sustainability Report, showcasing its sustainability efforts. With over 20 years of experience in Latin America, the report emphasizes GeoPark's commitment to reducing energy intensity and environmental impact. These initiatives aim to enhance operational resilience, efficiency, and value creation for the company. The publication of the report signifies GeoPark's dedication to sustainable practices and maximizing value.
news.headline: GeoPark Limited releases 2024 sustainability report. Highlights progress in reducing energy intensity and environmental footprint.

news.summary: In Houston, Black Stone Minerals, L.P. (NYSE: BSM) declared a cash distribution of $0.375 per common unit for the first quarter of 2025, matching the previous quarter's amount. This announcement was made along with the confirmation of the date for the first quarter 2025 earnings call.
news.headline: Black Stone Minerals, L.P. declares $0.375 per common unit distribution for Q1 2025, plans earnings call.

news.summary: In Toronto, Hudson’s Bay Company ULC revealed plans to hold a specialized auction, known as the “Art Auction,” to sell off its prized collection of historically significant art and artifacts. This decision is part of the Company’s restructuring process under the Companies’ Creditors Arrangement Act (CCAA). Among the items up for sale are the Company’s Royal Charter and other valuable artifacts. This move is pending court approval and is aimed at generating funds as the Company navigates through its restructuring phase.
news.headline: Hudson’s Bay Company to sell important art and artifacts through dedicated auction amid restructuring, recognizing historical value.

news.summary: SKK Holdings Limited, a civil engineering service provider focusing on subsurface utility works in Singapore, has recently disclosed that it was notified by The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC on April 14, 2025. The notification letter addressed the Company's failure to uphold the Nasdaq Listing Rules 5550(a)(2) due to its closing bid price falling below $1 per share from February 28, 2025, to April 11, 2025. As a result, SKK no longer meets the continued listing requirement set by Nasdaq. The Company is publicly traded on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol SKK (Nasdaq: SKK).
news.headline: SKK Holdings Limited received a Nasdaq notification due to not meeting minimum bid price of $1 per share.

news.summary: Liberty Energy Inc. released its first quarter 2025 financial and operational results, showcasing a revenue increase to $977 million, a 4% rise from the previous quarter. The company reported a net income of $20 million, translating to $0.12 fully diluted earnings per share. The adjusted EBITDA stood at $168 million, marking an 8% sequential increase. Liberty achieved a 12% TTM Adjusted Pre-Tax Return on Capital Employed (ROCE). Moreover, they distributed $37 million to shareholders through share distribution.
news.headline: Liberty Energy Inc. reports Q1 2025 financial results: revenue of $977 million, net income of $20 million, EBITDA of $168 million.
MRC Global reveals initial Q1 2025 figures; positive outlook with robust performance.

news.summary: According to a recent study conducted by Oxford Economics Africa and commissioned by Malaria No More, an analysis revealed that the total amount of U.S. funding for malaria over the past two decades has been substantial. This funding primarily took the form of contributions through the bilateral President's Malaria Initiative and the U.S. donations to the Global Fund. The report did not specify the exact figures but indicated that the funding allocation for malaria control efforts has been significant. This data showcases the ongoing commitment of the U.S. towards combating malaria on a global scale.
news.headline: Oxford Economics study: US Malaria funding of past 20 years boosted economies by more than $90 billion.

news.summary: In Irvine, California, on April 16, 2025, it was reported that more than 25 years ago, the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) initiated the systematic monitoring of autism rates in the United States. In 1970, the prevalence was 1 in 10,000. According to the recently published 2022 CDC report on Autism, the current numbers reveal a significant increase in autism prevalence over the years.
news.headline: CDC data: Autism rates surge in US, 1 in 31 children diagnosed; in 1970, rate was 1 in 10,000.

news.summary: LADERA RANCH, California -- SmartStop Self Storage REIT, Inc. (NYSE:SMA), a leading real estate investment trust specializing in self-storage facilities in the U.S. and Canada, disclosed plans to unveil its Q1 financial results up to March 31, 2025, post-market closure on May 7, 2025. The management will conduct a conference call and webcast to review these outcomes on May 8, 2025, at 1:00 PM.
news.headline: SmartStop Self Storage REIT to release first quarter 2025 results on May 7, 2025; conference call on May 8, 2025 at 1:00.

news.summary: In Pine Bluff, Arkansas on April 16, 2025, George Makris, Jr., the Chairman and CEO of Simmons, discussed the company's first quarter 2025 results. Makris expressed satisfaction with the performance during the quarter, highlighting the ongoing enhancement in profitability fundamentals.
news.headline: Simmons First National Corporation reports strong first quarter 2025 results, CEO notes improved profitability.

news.summary: Dallas-based company Ashford Hospitality Trust, Inc. (NYSE: AHT) released a statement today revealing their anticipated first quarter performance for 2025. They predict an Occupancy rate of around 68% in conjunction with an Average Daily Rate of about $196.
news.headline: Ashford Hospitality Trust expects 68% occupancy, $196 ADR in Q1 2025.

news.summary: Alcoa Corp. (NYSE: AA) recently unveiled its first-quarter results following Wednesday's market close. In the quarter, the company posted earnings of $2.15 per share, surpassing the analyst consensus projection of $1.70. Despite this earnings beat, quarterly revenue fell below expectations at $3.37 billion, missing the forecast of $3.53 billion. Nonetheless, the revenue showed growth compared to the $2.6 billion generated in the same period last year. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Alcoa's Q1 results: EPS beats at $2.15, revenues miss at $3.37B. Share price gains post-release.

news.summary: On April 16, 2025, in Conway, Arkansas, Home BancShares, Inc. (NYSE: HOMB), the parent company of Centennial Bank, announced its quarterly earnings report.
news.headline: Home BancShares, Inc. (NYSE: HOMB), parent of Centennial Bank, reports stable first-quarter earnings on April 16, 2025.

news.summary: The US Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) held a roundtable discussion on custody matters with industry insiders from companies such as Kraken, Exodus, Anchorage Digital, WisdomTree, Fidelity Digital Asset Services, and Fireblocks. The discussion was led by SEC commissioners Peirce and Crenshaw, acting chair Uyeda, and crypto task force Chief of Staff Gabbert. The demand for digital asset custody in the US has increased, especially since the approval of crypto exchange-traded funds in January 2024. The SEC seems to be moving in a direction more favorable to the crypto industry following the departure of former SEC Chair Gensler. Topics in the roundtable's agenda included broker-dealers, custody at investment firms, and discussions about tailoring regulations for crypto trading. The article also mentioned the involvement of the Tesla CEO Elon Musk's government efficiency team, DOGE, in the SEC's systems and data, with reports suggesting attempts to access them. Regulatory changes and the involvement of key industry players in discussions hint at potential shifts in the regulatory framework for cryptocurrency in the US.
news.headline: SEC's upcoming roundtable on crypto custody will involve insiders from Kraken, Exodus, Anchorage Digital, etc. Peirce leads the task force.

news.summary: Peru's largest publicly-traded precious metals mining company, Buenaventura, reported its 1Q25 production and sales figures. The company announced the following production numbers for the first three months of 2025: El Brocal produced 4,627 gold ounces, Orcopampa produced 14,295 gold ounces, Tambomayo produced 3,034 gold ounces, Julcani produced 1,880 gold ounces, and La Zanja produced 4,XXX gold ounces. The company provided production guidance for the full year of 2025, with El Brocal expected to produce between 15.5k and 18.5k gold ounces, Orcopampa between 45.0k and 50.0k gold ounces, Tambomayo between 12.5k and 15.5k gold ounces, and Julcani between 7.5k and 9.5k gold ounces. The company operates on the NYSE under the ticker symbol BVN and on the Lima Stock Exchange as BUE.LM.
news.headline: Buenaventura reports 1Q25 production results: Gold - El Brocal (4,627 oz), Orcopampa (14,295 oz), Tambomayo (3,034 oz), Julcani (1,880 oz), La Zanja (4,XXX oz).

news.summary: Empire State Realty Trust, Inc. revealed that it has renewed a lease agreement with Gerson Lehrman Group, Inc., a financial and global information services consulting company, for a space spanning 77,382 square feet at One Grand Central Place. GLG, which became part of the ESRT portfolio in 2013, currently occupies two complete floors with views overlooking Vanderbilt Plaza. The statement highlighted the strategic appeal of One Grand Central Place's location and office setup, stating that it serves as an optimal headquarters for GLG's operations.
news.headline: Gerson Lehrman Group renews 77,382 sq ft lease at One Grand Central Place in NYC. Joined ESRT in 2013.

news.summary: Sturm, Ruger & Company, Inc. (NYSE:RGR) is set to reveal its financial performance for Q1 2025 and submit its Quarterly Report on Form 10-Q on April 30, 2025, post the stock market’s closing. The company will then conduct a webcast on May 1, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. ET to analyze its first quarter operational outcomes. For those keen on tuning in, the webcast can be accessed through a provided link or by going to Ruger.com/corporate. Viewers have the opportunity to ask questions during the webcast.
news.headline: Sturm, Ruger & Co. to report Q1 2025 financial results on April 30, with a webcast on May 1 at 9:00 a.m. ET. Buy NYSE: RGR stocks.

news.summary: In Ypsilanti, Michigan, the American Center for Mobility (ACM) will be hosting the "SAFE" Demo Day on June 6, 2025. This event aims to highlight advancements in vehicle mobility, specifically focusing on Connected and Autonomous Vehicles. The event will feature the latest innovations in this field, with expected participation from numerous industry leaders and experts. This annual event is highly anticipated, drawing attention from both national and international audiences. Mark your calendars for this exciting showcase of cutting-edge technology and industry trends.
news.headline: ACM's "SAFE" Demo Day in Ypsilanti on June 6, 2025, features innovations in Connected and Autonomous Vehicles.

news.summary: In Mississauga, Ontario on April 16, 2025, Bird Construction Inc. (TSX: BDT) shared their excitement over securing five projects. These ventures span across infrastructure, industrial, and buildings sectors, boasting a total worth exceeding $650 million.
news.headline: Bird Construction Inc. secures $650+ million in new awards for five projects in infrastructure, industrial, and buildings sectors.

news.summary: CBL International Limited has announced their full-year results for 2024, showing a significant increase in revenue. The company's revenue saw a notable 35.9% jump, reaching $592.5 million. This surge in revenue comes as a result of their successful global expansion efforts.
news.headline: CBL International Ltd. sees revenue surge by 35.9% to $592.5 million in 2024, driven by global growth.

news.summary: Matador Resources Company declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.3125 per share of common stock, set to be paid on June 6, 2025, to shareholders of record as of May 9, 2025. Matador is a US-based independent energy company focused on the exploration, development, production, and acquisition of oil and natural gas resources. They are listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol MTDR.
news.headline: Matador Resources declares $0.3125 quarterly dividend on May 9, 2025, to be payable on June 6, 2025.

news.summary: ASHBURN, Va.--DXC Technology disclosed that it is set to unveil its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025 on May 14, 2025, around 4:15 p.m. ET. After the release, a conference call and webcast will be conducted by DXC Technology's senior management at 5:00 p.m. ET. Domestic callers can dial 888-330-2455, while international callers should dial +1-240-789-2717. The passcode for the call is yet to be provided.
news.headline: DXC Technology to reveal Q4 and full fiscal year 2025 results on May 14 at 4:15 pm ET. Conference call at 5:00 pm ET.

news.summary: Everspin Technologies, a prominent company in MRAM technology (NASDAQ: MRAM), will announce its Q1 2025 financial results on April 30, 2025, after the market closes. The President and CEO, Sanjeev Aggarwal, along with the CFO, Bill Cooper, will conduct a conference call at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time on the same day to provide insights and discuss the company’s performance. Everspin is recognized globally for its MRAM persistent memory solutions, being a leader in this sector. Stay tuned for updates following the conference call.
news.headline: Everspin (NASDAQ: MRAM) to report Q1 2025 results on Apr 30, CEO and CFO to host conference call at 5 pm ET.

news.summary: Grey Wolf Animal Health Corp. reported its financial results for Q4 and full year 2024. The company closed the acquisition of The Compounding Pharmacy of Manitoba, resulting in revenue growth of 8.6% to $6.7 million for the quarter and 5.6% to $26.8 million for the year. Gross profit also saw an increase of 9.5% to $3.4 million for the quarter and 7.3% to $13.8 million for the year. Adjusted EBITDA rose by 29.0% to $0.9 million for the quarter and 17.4% to $4.3 million for the year. The Pharmacy business grew by 8.8% to $14.7 million, while the Animal Health business saw a 1.9% increase to $12.1 million. Total expenses decreased by 1.6% to $11.1 million in 2024. Operating income for the year was $1.9 million, and net income stood at $704,668. Key financial data for the period is detailed in the article. CEO Angela Cechetto emphasized the company's growth and progress, despite challenges in the veterinary market.
news.headline: Grey Wolf Animal Health reported Q4 revenue increased by 8.6% to $6.7M, full-year revenue increased by 5.6% to $26.8M. Adjusted EBITDA increased by 29% to $0.9M for the quarter and 17.4% to $4.3M for the year. CEO mentioned growth in Pharmacy business and the acquisition of CPM. Total expenses decreased by 1.6% to $11.1M over 2023.
White House press secretary Leavitt concludes briefing

news.summary: Nominations are currently being accepted for the 2025 American Association for Justice (AAJ) Paralegal of the Year Award in Nashville, Tennessee. This award highlights the importance of paralegals in the civil justice system. The annual award, sponsored by the AAJ, seeks to honor outstanding individuals in the field.
news.headline: Nominations open for 2025 AAJ Paralegal of the Year Award. Sponsor: Advocate Capital, Inc. Nashville.

news.summary: On April 16, 2025, in Mt. Olive, New Jersey, Vislink Technologies, Inc. revealed that their DragonFly V 5G wireless video camera transmitter secured the TV Tech Best of Show Award at NAB 2025. Vislink Technologies, Inc. (OTCQB: VISL) is recognized globally for its expertise in producing, distributing, and organizing high-definition live video and related data in the broadcast, public safety, and defense fields. This accomplishment highlights their cutting-edge technology in the industry, consolidating their position as leaders.
news.headline: Vislink's DragonFly V 5G wins TV Tech's NAB Best of Show Award for World's Smallest Cellular Bonding Transmitter.
